Talking with the [[Developers|developers]] is the best way to get involved with the [[OpenLieroX]] project. There are multiple ways you can contact us. Best way is to leave a mail in our [[Mailinglist|mailinglist]], i.e. at [mailto:openlierox-devel@lists.sourceforge.net openlierox-devel@lists.sourceforge.net].

== Instant messaging / Chatting ==
Some contact details of the main developers:

* ''Albert''
** Jabber/GTalk: albzey@gmail.com
** ICQ: 107220269
* ''Karel'' (alias DarkCharlie)
** ICQ: 241749823
** MSN: karel.petranek@tiscali.cz

There is also [[IRC|an IRC room]], although it is not visited that often from the developers.

== Further links ==
Read more details about [[How to contribute to OpenLieroX|how to contribute to OpenLieroX]].

== Frequently asked questions ==
In many cases, people interested in the code of OLX are asking the same questions. I have copied some [[Typical developer introduction talk|chat excerpts which answer some common questions here]].

<!-- imported from Wayback Machine: https://web.archive.org/web/20110721112425/http://www.openlierox.net/wiki/index.php/Talk_with_the_developers -->
